category_sources: source_facts.description says Cairo is a vector graphics library; official cairographics.org homepage describes Cairo as a 2D graphics library with multiple output devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cairo; official cairographics.org homepage uses Cairo.
docs_sources: Official cairographics.org documentation page links primary sources including FAQ, tutorial, API reference manual, cookbook, and samples.
repo_sources: Official cairographics.org download page documents Cairo's git source; freedesktop cgit identifies the central repository as mirrored from gitlab.freedesktop.org/cairo/cairo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official cairographics.org homepage lists 2D graphics, vector-style drawing, and PDF/SVG output support.
